summary: Comprehensive testing of REDACTED app completed. All backend APIs (20/20 tests passed) including auth endpoints, forgot-password, reset-password, change-password, and history. All frontend features working correctly - landing page, auth flow, forgot password, profile page with password change, dashboard with document input and platform selector.

warnings.issue: React warning: Cannot update component while rendering different component - caused by navigate() call during render

passed_tests: Landing page loads with hero section 'WHAT ARE THEY HIDING?'
Landing page has How It Works section with 3 steps (01, 02, 03)
Landing page has platform previews (Twitter, Facebook, Instagram mockups)
Landing page has demo section with typewriter animation
Landing page has video section with generate button
Landing page has final CTA with 'Create Your Free Account' button
Auth page loads with login/signup toggle
Auth page has Google auth button
Auth page has 'Forgot password?' link that navigates to /forgot-password
Forgot password page has email input and submit button
Forgot password flow shows success message after submission
POST /api/auth/register creates user and returns JWT
POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials returns JWT
POST /api/auth/login with invalid credentials returns 401
POST /api/auth/change-password works with correct current password
POST /api/auth/change-password rejects wrong current password (401)
POST /api/auth/forgot-password returns success message
POST /api/auth/reset-password rejects invalid token (400)
GET /api/auth/me returns user data with valid token
GET /api/auth/me rejects requests without token (401)
GET /api/history returns user-specific sessions
Profile page (/profile) loads when authenticated with user info
Profile page has current password, new password, confirm password fields
Profile page has UPDATE PASSWORD button
Profile password change works end-to-end
Header has profile icon button that links to /profile
Header has history dropdown and logout button
Dashboard page loads with document input and platform selector
Dashboard has declassify button
ResultsView has download button for images with data-testid
ResultsView has download caption text
VideoGenSection has download button when video is ready
POST /api/generate-video returns video_id with status 'generating'
critical_code_review_comments: Minor React warning in AuthPage: navigate() called during render causing setState warning - consider using useEffect for redirect
seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created during pytest run with TEST_ prefix emails
context_for_next_testing_agent: All auth endpoints verified working. Test user test@redacted.gov with password newpass123 available. Backend tests cover register, login, change-password, forgot-password, reset-password, history. Frontend tests verify landing page sections, auth flow, forgot password, profile page, dashboard elements.
